human_official_session_steps: Open the official Frantic #47 page or agent work item in an already-authorized official session.
Confirm the work item is #47 and shows revision/redelivery/resubmit action.
Submit only the public artifact refs in preflight_payload.artifact_refs.
Do not expose token, cookie, localStorage, payout, KYC, tax, wallet, bank, card, identity, or private-data fields to agents.
Return only safe fields: submitted Yes/No, delivery_ref if shown, accepted, paid, revising, rejected, earnedUsd, payout usable Yes/No.
hard_boundary: Agent1 must not touch Frantic token/cookie/localStorage/session authority.
Agent1 must not configure payout or handle KYC/tax/address/identity/payment/wallet data.
Agent1 must not claim income until payment or usable payout is verified.
